channel.title: [Upcoming Event] WordPress Meetup for Devs in Madrid (Spain) - Sept 11, 2019
channel.description:
The WordPress Meetup for Devs in Madrid is back in September and this time we'll have a **React workshop** for beginners given by [Sonia Ruiz](https://twitter.com/Yune__vk). 🎉
If you are in Madrid area and want to learn React, join us next Wednesday 11th of September. It's **free**! After the workshop, we'll have some drinks and pizza! 🍕
Please note that this event will be held in **Spanish**.
You can reserve your seat and read more about the workshop in the following link: https://www.meetup.com/es-ES/WordPress-Madrid/events/263751142/.
Hope to see you there! 🙌
![taller-react-sonia-final|690x388,75%](upload://ipU5W4ypjNryPzBHniIuT1OpW6I.png)

item.title: [Upcoming Event] WordPress Meetup for Devs in Madrid (Spain) - Sept 11, 2019
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
The WordPress Meetup for Devs in Madrid is back in September and this time we’ll have a React workshop for beginners given by Sonia Ruiz.

If you are in Madrid area and want to learn React, join us next Wednesday 11th of September. It’s free! After the workshop, we’ll have some drinks and pizza!

Please note that this event will be held in Spanish.

You can reserve your seat and read more about the workshop in the following link: https://www.meetup.com/es-ES/WordPress-Madrid/events/263751142/.

Hope to see you there!

Read full topic
item.source: [Upcoming Event] WordPress Meetup for Devs in Madrid (Spain) - Sept 11, 2019
